error_signature: select is probably returning the value as a string
title: Dropdown value type mismatch
symptom: The dropdown selection does not match the expected data type, causing issues in displaying the corresponding image and name.
applies_when: Using a dropdown to select values
Trying to display associated data based on selection
not_this_if: The dropdown correctly displays the associated data without issues
root_cause: The dropdown component may return the selected value as a string, while the data list expects a number. This type mismatch prevents the correct lookup of associated data.
fix_steps: Wrap the dropdown value with `toNumber()` in your formula
Test the dropdown again to see if it retrieves the correct data
agent_instruction: Use `toNumber()` to convert the dropdown value to the correct type for data lookup.
